headline: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
summary: CHICAGO, July 21, 2026--Northern Trust has raised its quarterly cash dividend to $0.88 per share on its common stock.

raw.headline: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock

headline: Why fixed income ETFs are having a moment — and how to use them
summary: Fixed income ETFs are quietly having one of their strongest years ever. Northern Trust’s Danielle Rutsky breaks down why investors are piling into muni bonds and bond ladders — and how these tools help boost income, manage cash flow, and protect against inflation and rate risk.

raw.headline: Why fixed income ETFs are having a moment — and how to use them
raw.summary: Fixed income ETFs are quietly having one of their strongest years ever. Northern Trust’s Danielle Rutsky breaks down why investors are piling into muni bonds and bond ladders — and how these tools help boost income, manage cash flow, and protect against inflation and rate risk.

headline: Invested as One: Northern Trust Grants Employees Company Stock
summary: CHICAGO, July 21, 2026--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) today announced Invested as One, a new employee ownership initiative under which eligible employees working at the company as of June 30, 2026, will receive up to 10 shares of Northern Trust common stock.

raw.headline: Invested as One: Northern Trust Grants Employees Company Stock

headline: Northern Trust Earnings: What To Look For From NTRS
summary: Financial services company Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) will be reporting results this Wednesday before market open. Here’s what you need to know.
